fomod.Name: SLO VE
fomod.Author: crajjjj
fomod.Description:
Scene voices, facial expressions, body SFX and an optional willpower/resistance system for SexLab. Configured entirely in TOML - no MCM. Runs on AudioUtil for folder-based voice playback and lipsync.
The installer asks which SexLab flavour you run: SexLab Framework P+ (2.x) or classic SexLab Framework SE 1.63 (which additionally requires SexLab Separate Orgasm). The correct script set is installed for you.
